chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Misc. Application No.760 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of main case -------------------------------------------- 21.02.2025 None present for applicant. Same was the position on the last date of hearing viz. 24.12.2024. Continuous absence of applicant and his counsel shows that they have lost interest to pursue their case. Therefore, this criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed on account of non-prosecution. J U D G E Gulsher/PS z
